missouri_specific.name: Missouri Tickborne Disease Story Map (2009–2023)
missouri_specific.description: Interactive dashboards with county/jurisdiction case rates for Ehrlichiosis, Spotted Fever Rickettsiosis, Tularemia, Lyme, Anaplasmosis
missouri_specific.notes: The single best visual source for MO county-level trends — perfect for popups or animated layers

missouri_specific.name: Missouri Alpha-gal Syndrome Official Estimate
missouri_specific.notes: Strong counter to Reddit claims — include this number in MO popups

missouri_specific.name: 2025 Lone Star Tick Surveillance – Missouri
missouri_specific.description: County-level established status for Lone Star ticks (Alpha-gal vector)
missouri_specific.notes: Established in virtually every Missouri county — this will light MO up red

missouri_specific.name: Missouri DHSS Tickborne Disease Main Page
missouri_specific.description: Reportable diseases (RMSF, Ehrlichiosis, Tularemia, Lyme-like) and general surveillance info
missouri_specific.notes: Links to reportable disease list and reference manual

missouri_specific.name: Show-Me Ticks Citizen Science Study
missouri_specific.description: 3,811 ticks collected in 33 counties — 89% were Lone Star ticks
